[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Karg''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer just prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
According to his own claim, his [[Karg's father|father]] was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Karg received an order from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to find the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] after [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was placed under arrest. When he landed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]] to arrest Leia and [[Mia Ikova]], he was almost [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the ''Tantive IV'' [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and was badly wounded. Leia took Karg onboard ''Tantive IV'' to treat his injuries. Several [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] later and a few [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] after Mia Ikova's death, Karg died from his extensive injuries.
